name: Pirate Coast
politics: Pirate crews, smugglers and informants control practical power.
Alliances shift quickly when gold appears.
culture: Trust is measured in coin, threats and shared danger.
Ship names carry reputations stronger than flags.
rumours: A captain buried treasure under a singing stone.
A ghost lantern appears before raids.
One pirate crew is secretly working for serpent folk.
dmSecrets: A pirate contact can become ally or enemy.
A cache contains a map fragment to the interior.
A wreck holds more than stolen goods.
